item.title: They didn't burn witches
item.description: They burned women. This is my time of year. When witches are free from the Broom closet, even if only for a little while.

item.title: News of the soldier loved on by a tortie while resting in the ruins of a building. He promised himself he would take her home if he saw her again and now she lives with them.
item.dc:creator: Combatant

item.title: “Proud Boys” is trending on social media, here’s why…
item.description:
https://youtu.be/NC1MNGFHR58?si=qZIcLONkBF6wwWYK
Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com or to vote.gov . If you make use of mail-in voting, check trackvote.org to find out if your state offers a ballot tracking service. If your state permits early voting, consider taking advantage of that privilege! Certain states continue to “accidentally” purge legally registered voters from their rolls, so check to make sure you haven’t been purged. Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Memes vol 389
item.description:
YALL I GOT FIRED!!
Anywho
HIPPOS ARE SO SCARY AND MOO DENG IS NO EXCEPTION!! They’re raising a biting killer
Nephilim. And Nessie is a dinosaur who survived
ASSASSIN?!?! WHY IS ASSASSIN ON THERE SOMEONE PLEASE EXPLAIN!!
The eclipse
They just released another album 2 days ago. They’re my second favorite band
Kamala is 60 and quite pretty I think so like
Nessie tax
Liza Jane tax (excuse her weird boobs- she’s had like 47 children) ((my mom got her from a retired breeder))
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax- she was climbing all over my boyfriend with not a care in the world (look at how gray her face is getting :() (it’s very cute though)

item.title: Relics from another time - collected for your viewing pleasure ;)
item.description:
Bruno Zach (1891-1945) The "Riding Crop". An extremely rare, large bronze figure of a dominatrix holding her riding crop behind her back, upon a signed oval bronze sôcle. Signed ‘Bruno Zach’ in the bronze, circa 1924
Table lamp Woman with a Torch, ca. 1900 Louis Chalon (1866-1940) - French artist and sculptor.
Cup - Henri Husson (1909)
1890 chair, by Heywood Brothers Wakefield Campany
AFFORTUNATO GORI. Oriental Dancer.
LOUIS MAJORELLE (1859-1926) & DAUM Rare ‘Nénuphar’ Table Lamp, circa 1900
Lucien Gaillard, Hair comb with dragonflies, c.1904
Theophile Francois Somme (1871-1952)
An Art Nouveau punch bowl from c. 1900 by WMF (Württembergische Metallwaren Fabrik), Germany.
Louis Comfort Tiffany (1848–1933).
Tiffany & Co. Silver Enameled & Hardstone Chocolate Pot of Moorish Design, c. 1875-1891. Designed by Edward C. Moore.
Charles Catteau for Boch Frères Ceramis, Vaseau Quetzal, circa 1930.
Art Nouveau spider web necklace, ca. 1900 Murle Bennett.
Gustav Gurschner, vase, Vienna, c. 1905
Brooch/pendant designed by Georges Fouquet in the late 19th century.
John Henry Belter, Side Chair, 1850-60, Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York
A Viennese gem-set silver-gilt, enamel and rock crystal peacock , CIRCA 1880 .
Art Noveau bentwood and wicker armchair, 1910, France, by Clement Gelly & Cie
Dragonfly Fairy and Frog Art Nouveau Vase (1898)
Gallé, Monumental ‘Glycines’ Vase, c. 1920.
René Lalique (1860-1945). ‘Dragonfly-woman’ - corsage ornament, c. 1897-98. Gold, chrysoprase, diamonds, moonstones, chalcedony and enamel. Calouste Gulbenkian Museum, Lisbon.
lampe à pétrole, Louis Comfort Tiffany, 1897
Czech Art Deco Perfume bottle, Turriet & Bardach, c.1930
A RUSSIAN SILVER GILT AND CLOISONNÉ ENAMEL GOBLET, Ivan Petrovich Khlebnikov, St. Petersburg, Russia, circa 1908-1917
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.description: https://www.reuters.com/world/us/michelle-obama-harris-trump-campaign-michigan-saturday-2024-10-26/ "Somehow, it is apparently baked into this campaign that Trump is allowed to talk and act like a complete lunatic while Harris has to be perfect in every way." https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2024/10/24/harris-trump-cnn-town-hall/ “He gets to be lawless. She has to be flawless.” ~Van Jones https://www.huffpost.com/entry/van-jones-kamala-harris-donald-trump-comments_n_671a14b1e4b07a6807469694

item.title: I moved on Trump like a bitch. You know, I’m automatically attracted to voting — I just start voting. It’s like a magnet. Just vote. I don’t even wait. And when you’re registered, they let you do it.
item.description:
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
Just had to sneak this one in.
?VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT? • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
Lamb of God tax
Vote like your life depends upon it

item.title: Hidden blind in African watering hole
item.description: This lodge in Kenya includes access to a photography blind hidden in the middle of a busy watering hole, providing up close views of various African wildlife as they drink and bathe.
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Cosplayed all the Dimitescu sisters! Made a fun edit too!
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: The Crow Cosplay Progression
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— wanted to share the development of my Eric Draven cosplay. Been obsessed with the movie since 2011, but I didn’t try dressing up as him till 2017. 2017 was not my best work, wasn’t in a good place health-wise or in my life as a whole either. 2019 was slimmer, slightly more accurate, but I hadn’t quite figured out that I shouldn’t paint the WHOLE face white and then add the black over it. My friend Nick (he’s no longer with us and missed every day), would teach me what I know of facepaint later that year. Forever grateful. 2023 was better still, but I’m so not into that wig. I did get my best photos in that one though, so can’t complain too much! 2024 is literally my Sistine Chapel. I know that sounds dumb because of how simple this is, but it means a lot to me. I think I rocked the makeup, I have all the tape and twine everywhere like he does (literally made a tape corset), the replica ring, I’m really proud!
Bonus pic— I’m one of those people that really likes to match purses to costumes, so I painted this one!
It’s based on some fanart I found— I just bought a coffin-shaped pleather bag on Amazon and used angelus leather paint to do this design.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Prefect 5/7 ... wood.
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: My son doesn't always believe me when I tell him he looks particularly masculine (is this weird?) but strangers are harder to ignore.
item.description: My son was also nervous, so the rest of his day was very positive. I know there's rules against behavior, but that they used his correct gender despite his ID not meshing with it was awesome and speaks volumes on the work he's put in to look how he wants (no hormones or surgeries yet)
item.dc:creator: EmptyWeird

item.title: A dream come true!!
item.description: I don't know how to say this so I'll scream it I'M GOING TO THE PRICE IS RIGHT!!! I'm literally on a plane headed to cali, WITH tickets for a taping of the show tomorrow!!!! We will be taping a prime time show, I hope we get picked, and wish us luck!!!!!
item.dc:creator: thefreckledfox

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 67 (clown motel cemetery)
item.description:
I want a pet crow so badly. Anyway, HELLO and welcome to another meme dump, my dearest imgur friends! I have survived another week, and now I belatedly bestow upon you some amusing stolen images. Let us view them together.
Yeah, my window faces the sunrise so even with the blinds closed a sneaky beam of light sneaks through the slats and stabs me in the eyeballs every morning. I need a curtain.
I too enjoy embarrassing the youths this way
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
I need an adult. ...wait, I AM the adult. Fuck.
seriously man, stop
apparently we have the same mom
I've been writing the same book for 20 years, so this is especially accurate. Got that George R.R. Martin energy here. Will it ever be finished? Fuck if I know.
truly, make thyself known
no it is not, please add even more skeletons
I try anyway in between the sobbing and apology scritches
fuck
almost there, I might just make it
sure miss it
you really did
And now, I wait All right imgur friends, you've made it to the end of the dump. Until next time, don't forget to be awesome
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.dc:creator: LizzyLovesGiraffes

item.title: I came to the U.S. from a country under a Dictatorship Regime for the past 49 years. North Korea has it for 76. Some people will swear that's “Not That Bad”. However the Soviet-Communism Americans fear so much could become a reality if you don't FIGHT NOW
item.description:
This is not the time to play. This is not the time to fool around. It is the Democracy of the United States and the American ways that are threatened right now. Fight for Democracy. Vote for Kamala Harris and Democrats. It was already really hard to gain the Democracy we live today in America. If you don't STOP this threat NOW in this election, this may be the last time you can do it with your VOTE. And DO SOMETHING. Call fellow citizens and remind them about their DUTY to the Constitution of the United States and to choose, preserve, and protect DEMOCRACY. You won't have to use your phone number and the dialing is automatic. Get a quick training and join us at go.kamalaharris.com/calls/ Trust me, if you “can't” fight now, you are dooming your own future and the future of your children and everybody else. Not letting #kamalaharris WIN this election, and allowing Trump and his cronies to take power with your help, is a dangerous risk for millions of people not only in America, but everywhere rich people want to keep themselves unaccountable for their crimes. VOTE for the DEMOCRATIC Party your entire Ballot so a Democrat Congress can get Harris-Walz to fulfill their promises. #voteblue #bluewave #bluetsunami #harriswalz #savedemocracy #joyfulwarriors #votedemocrat #timwalz #unitedstates #california #losangeles #presidentialelection #elections #bluemegathrustearthquake #northkorea #unitedstates #DEMOCRACY #fightfordemocracy #whenwevotewewin
VOTE for the DEMOCRATIC Party your entire Ballot so a Democrat Congress can get Harris-Walz to fulfill their promises.
VOTE for the DEMOCRATIC Party your entire Ballot so a Democrat Congress can get Harris-Walz to fulfill their promises.
What happens in dictatorships even when they call themselves “Democratic Republics” or “Republic” and swear they have elections: 1. Protests for the betterment of the citizen's rights are crushed violently. 2. The police only obey or take instructions by superior orders directly from the President, his family members, or his cronies. 3. The supportive oligarchy money belongs to the ruler. It is up to them to pay for his and his family's lifestyle if they even want to do business in “his country.” 4. Public institutions don't function properly because they are filled by incompetent loyalists who are only there because they suck up to the leader and his authority. 5. If the leader wants to fuck your wife, your daughter, your son, or your parents, sexually or financially, he can, and if you complain, you get shot or in prison. 6. If the leader is petty and he doesn't like you or doesn't like something you did, you can lick the floor he steps on or even let him defecate in your mouth; you will be destined to get shot, to live in prison or to live on your knees until you die. 7. Talking about politics, policy, or journalism is exclusive and only if it aligns with the leader's ideas, thoughts, and whims. It is unbelievable some Americans are so racist, homophobic, transphobic, xenophobic, and ableist that they are risking their own freedom because of their extreme prejudice and hatred of others. There are no countries for you to escape. All of us coming here from abroad were also escaping it. America has been the safe haven for millions. It doesn't mean that things here are perfect. There is so much that must change. But it is the U.S. that has been setting the tone for a century now.
item.dc:creator: AmericanJoy
